docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY CAPILI NATALIA S. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAPANTA VERONICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
UNABLE TO SERVE VERONICO ZAPANTA FOR 9-3-92.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-09-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF SEP-03-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAPANTA VERONICO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPILI NATALIA S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAPANTA VERONICO $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $385.00, SETTLEMENT REACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
